comments.body:
**Ref Ticket:** **https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/agent/tickets/335396**

**Need assistance from L3 Team:**

The customer wanted to show estimated delivery dates at checkout in date format rather than showing it in days. Currently, the app is showing in days at checkout.

Current Way:

 ![](https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/attachments/token/Moq6XtP8brnsJkLtE33LY1ONB/?name=image.png)

Expected Way:

 ![](https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/attachments/token/wi0xRKzQagI4K69NBkJvws5ef/?name=image.png)

I had discussed with Sanoop sir on this and moving to L3 for checking the feasibility.

**Store Details:**
**App:** BigCommerce FedEx App
**Store URL:** https://store-9bzin0a726.mybigcommerce.com (https://www.sororityspecialties.com)
**Account ID:** 41854998-5d07-4865-8d1e-23e44bbc9427
**Carrier:** FedEx
**Active For:** Rates
**Active From:** 26th June 2026. Currently on trial plan.
Customer has currently setup the FedEx app for BigCommerce on one site. Once they confirm, if the app is working as expected, they will be adding the app to a couple of other stores.

**Requirement:** The customer should show the estimated delivery date in date format rather than in days.


**Latest update from Veena on July 25, 2025:**

This enhancement is picked up fro development. Tentative release time: 3 to 4 weeks. Move the ticket to dev_needed after replying
[Veena]

comments.body:
Thanks.  Another question.  Does the product I'm using only work with Fedex or will it work with UPS too?
Thanks,

Lewis
comments.html_body:
Thanks.  Another question.  Does the product I'm using only work with Fedex or will it work with UPS too?
Thanks,
Lewis
comments.plain_body: Thanks.  Another question.  Does the product I'm using only work with Fedex or will it work with UPS too? Thanks,  Lewis

comments.body:
Hello Lewis Dawes,

Good Day!

The **Ship, Rate and Track for FedEx by PluginHive** app is a FedEx specific integration and does not provide integrations for any other carriers like UPS.

Our solution **Multi Carrier Shipping Label by PluginHive** app can be used for integrations with multiple carriers in one place and it supports FedEx and UPS carrier integration.

Let us know if you have any further queries.

Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello Lewis Dawes,
 
Good Day!
 
The Ship, Rate and Track for FedEx by PluginHive app is a FedEx specific integration and does not provide integrations for any other carriers like UPS.
 
Our solution Multi Carrier Shipping Label by PluginHive app can be used for integrations with multiple carriers in one place and it supports FedEx and UPS carrier integration.
 
Let us know if you have any further queries.
 
Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive
